release_label: Flow Memory Compute Market Production Planning Release with Hardened Audit and Provider Safety
changed_surface_summary: src/flow_memory/api compute audit verify route and manifest updates
src/flow_memory/cli audit verify and compute smoke path updates

verification.full_mypy: fails: Found 551 errors in 267 files (checked 729 source files); categories are legacy tests missing annotations, neural training typing debt, release/network tuple typing, protocol export/no-redef issues, web3 helper annotations, and unrelated storage/test optional typing
verification.expanded_compute_mypy: OK for compute_market, compute_endpoints, and new hardening tests
verification.cli_smoke: flow-memory console script readiness/health/providers/routes/policies/plan/audit/audit verify all exited 0 with ok=True
verification.git_diff_check: exit 0 with CRLF warnings for dashboard/src/mock-data/local-network-replay.json and docs/openapi/flow-memory.openapi.json
verification.naming_audit: acceptable hits only: checklist command text, geometric square in synthetic dataset, tests proving legacy naming absent
verification.safety_audit: acceptable hits only: safety docs, rejection lists, dry-run settlement simulation, disabled broadcast flags, tests, and gate documentation

known_limitations: Live settlement remains disabled and is not production-ready.
No private-key custody, signing service, or transaction broadcast is implemented.
Full repo mypy still fails in legacy/non-production areas.
SQLite remains the concrete bundled store; managed SQL deployment requires adapter/infrastructure integration.
Distributed rate limiter/circuit breaker scaffolds exist but require an injected backend in multi-node production.
Audit hash chaining is tamper-evident, not WORM storage.
